title: Scheduled Tasks
subtitle: Automate AI workflows with scheduled tasks
gatewayWarning: Gateway is not running. Scheduled tasks cannot be managed without an active Gateway.

empty.title: No scheduled tasks
empty.description: Create scheduled tasks to automate AI workflows. Tasks can send messages, run queries, or perform actions at specified times.

card.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this task?

dialog.messagePlaceholder: What should the AI do? e.g., Give me a summary of today's news and weather
dialog.deliveryDescription: Choose whether this task stays in MatchaClaw or is pushed to an external channel.
dialog.deliveryUnsupportedWeChat: WeChat scheduled delivery requires explicit sender account and recipient target.
dialog.deliveryWeChatRequirements: For WeChat scheduled delivery, set both recipient target (delivery.to) and sending account (delivery.accountId).
dialog.deliveryWeChatAccountRequired: WeChat scheduled delivery does not support auto account selection. Please choose a sending account.
dialog.deliveryTargetPlaceholder: Enter delivery target (for example: user:ou_xxx or chat:oc_xxx)
dialog.deliveryTargetDesc: This value maps to OpenClaw delivery.to.
dialog.noChannels: No channels available. Add a channel first.
dialog.discordChannelIdDesc: Right-click the Discord channel → Copy Channel ID
dialog.enableImmediatelyDesc: Start running this task after creation

toast.deliveryAccountRequiredWeChat: Please select a sending account for WeChat scheduled delivery
toast.deliveryChannelUnsupported: The selected channel does not support scheduled delivery yet
toast.discordIdRequired: Please enter a Discord Channel ID
toast.scheduleRequired: Please select or enter a schedule
